Inthc following shall ••, in exercise of the powers conferred by Sections 12 and 33 of the said Act, the Central Government, with Drags Technical Advisory Board, hereby makes the following rales further to amend the Drugs and :, 1945, namely :— rales may be called the Drags and Cosmetics (7th Amendment) Rules, 2005, shall come into force on the date of their publication in Official Gazettee. Drugs and Cosmetics Rules, 1945, in ScheduleK, after Serial Number 33 and the entries relating thereto, the )e inserted, namely:— l i e v Class o D r u g s Extent and Conditions of the exemption "(34) Pi o auction of Oxygen 93 per cent USP, pi oduced from air by the molecular sieve pi ocess, by a hospital or Medical Institute fc r their captive consumption. The provisions of Chapter IV of the. Act and the Rules made thereunderwhichrequire them to be covered by manufacturing licence under the rules, provided that the production facilities shall be open to inspection by an Inspector appointed under the Act, who can, if necessary, take samples for test".
